name: Tsoro Yematatu
author: Abstract Games factory

labels.no: Disallowed (standard): three-in-a-row must be formed in the movement phase
labels.yes: Allowed: a line completed while placing wins immediately

description: Tsoro Yematatu, a traditional Shona (Zimbabwean) three-in-a-row game on a seven-point triangular board. Each player drops three men, then slides or jumps them along the board's lines (jumps don't capture). Make three of your men in a straight line to win.
